data.title: Vivatides Therapeutics Announces Oversubscribed $54 Million Series A Financing to Accelerate Extrahepatic RNA Therapeutics Development
data.description: Vivatides Therapeutics, an international biotech firm based in SUZHOU, China and BOSTON, revealed on April 10, 2026, its commitment to advancing advanced RNA therapeutics for targets beyond the liver. The company specializes in developing cutting-edge delivery technologies for extrahepatic RNA-targeting medications. This signifies a significant milestone in the realm of RNA-based treatments, with Vivatides Therapeutics spearheading this innovative approach. The company's mission is to revolutionize the treatment landscape by expanding the reach of RNA therapeutics beyond traditional confines, marking a potentially groundbreaking development in the field.

data.title: AutoNation Announces First Quarter 2026 Earnings Conference Call and Audio Webcast Scheduled for Friday, May 1, 2026
data.description: AutoNation, Inc. (NYSE: AN) revealed plans to disclose its Q1 financial results for the period ending March 31, 2026, on May 1, 2026, before the market opens. The company will host a conference call and audio webcast on that day at 9:00 a.m. Eastern Time to discuss these results and provide additional insights. Interested individuals can dial 800-715-9871 (Conference ID: 90621) to join the call.

data.title: The Time to Talk about HIV is Now: ViiV Healthcare Launches "Still Here" PSA to Ignite Action Around HIV on National Youth HIV/AIDS Awareness Day
data.description: In Durham, North Carolina, ViiV Healthcare, a leading HIV company primarily owned by GSK with Shionogi as a shareholder, has introduced the "Still Here" social media video campaign. This initiative, released on National Youth HIV/AIDS Awareness Day, seeks to initiate important discussions about HIV among young individuals. The campaign addresses the concerning fact that HIV continues to be a prominent but neglected public health concern, particularly among the youth. This launch aims to highlight the urgent need for attention and action regarding HIV, as the infection rates among young people remain a pressing issue.

data.title: Real’s Monthly Agent Survey: Private Listings Gain Industry Attention, But Remain Rare in Practice
data.description: In Miami, according to Real’s Monthly Agent Survey, private listings are gaining attention within the industry but are still uncommon in practice. The survey highlights that while there is growing interest, actual implementation of private listings remains rare. Key figures indicate that only a small percentage of agents are utilizing this approach, despite the increasing buzz surrounding it.

data.title: Aramark Collegiate Hospitality Announces New Partnership with Suffolk University to Strengthen Student Experience
data.description: Aramark Collegiate Hospitality has revealed a fresh collaboration with Suffolk University in Boston, set to kick off in the summer of 2026.

data.title: CoreWeave Prices Upsized $3.5 Billion Convertible Senior Notes Offering
data.description: Livingston, N.J.--CoreWeave, Inc. disclosed the pricing of its private offering of $3.5 billion in total aggregate principal amount of its 1.75% convertible senior notes due in 2032. This amount is higher than the initially stated $3.0 billion aggregate principal amount. The settlement for the issuance and sale of the notes is set for April 14, 2026, contingent upon standard closing conditions. Additionally, CoreWeave granted the...

data.title: Snap and Qualcomm Expand Strategic Collaboration to Advance Intelligent Computing Experiences on Specs
data.description: In a joint announcement made today, Specs Inc., a subsidiary of Snap, and Qualcomm Technologies, Inc. revealed a multi-year strategic partnership. This collaboration aims to equip future versions of Specs eyewear with Qualcomm Technologies' cutting-edge Snapdragon system-on-a-chip (SoC). This marks a significant milestone for Specs Inc., as they prepare to introduce their flagship product, Specs - innovative eyewear that harmoniously merges digital interactions with reality - to the market later this year. This partnership sets the stage for further advancements as Specs continues to iterate and evolve its product offerings.

data.title: CoreWeave Announces Multi-Year Agreement With Anthropic
data.description: A partnership was revealed between CoreWeave, Inc. (Nasdaq: CRWV), The Essential Cloud for AI™, and Anthropic, a prominent AI research and development firm based in San Francisco. CoreWeave will be aiding in the development and deployment of Anthropic’s Claude AI models through a multi-year agreement. The collaboration will involve bringing compute online, beginning later this year. This alliance adds CoreWeave to Anthropic’s expanding network of infrastructure partners aimed at facilitating the expansion of Anthropic's operations.

data.title: Shareholders who lost money in Medpace Holdings, Inc. (NASDAQ: MEDP) Should Contact Wolf Haldenstein Immediately
data.description: The deadline for the lead plaintiff is set for June 5, 2026. On April 10, 2026, Wolf Haldenstein Adler Freeman & Herz LLP revealed the initiation of a class action lawsuit against Medpace Holdings, Inc. ("Medpace" or the Company) (NASDAQ: MEDP) in the United States District Court.

data.title: Shareholders who lost money in Gossamer Bio, Inc (NASDAQ: GOSS) Should Contact Wolf Haldenstein Immediately
data.description: The lead plaintiff deadline is set for June 1, 2026. On April 10, 2026, Wolf Haldenstein Adler Freeman & Herz LLP shared news about a class action lawsuit filed for shareholders who bought or acquired Gossamer Bio, Inc. The lawsuit pertains to potential wrongdoing by the Company.

data.title: Three Sunset World Group Hotels Receive 5-Star Rating in the 2026 Hotel Classification
data.description: Sunset World Group is pleased to announce that its five hotels located in Cancun and Playa del Carmen have been awarded the 2026 Hotel Classification Certification by the Mexican Secretariat of Tourism. This prestigious recognition confirms that the hotels meet the rigorous standards set by the certification process. This achievement highlights the commitment of Sunset World Group to providing high-quality hospitality services.

data.title: Bank of America Earnings Are Imminent; These Most Accurate Analysts Revise Forecasts Ahead Of Earnings Call
data.description: On April 15, Bank of America Corporation (NYSE: BAC) is set to announce its first-quarter earnings. Analysts are expecting the Charlotte-based company to report earnings of $1.01 per share, up from 90 cents per share a year ago. The consensus estimate for the quarterly revenue is $29.96 billion, compared to $27.37 billion last year. Bank of America recently announced the redemption of $3 billion in 3.559% fixed/floating rate senior notes due in April 2027. Following this news, Bank of America's shares increased by 1.6% to close at $52.71. For more details and latest analyst ratings, readers can visit Benzinga's Analyst Stock Ratings page.
